languages.text: Узы скверны навсегда сцепили инженеров с переборками корабля, превратив тот в объятого демонами и вечно страдающего левиафана, принцип работы систем которого неспособен постичь ни один разум.

The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.
languages.original_text: Узы скверны навсегда сцепили инженеров с переборками корабля, превратив тот в объятого демонами и вечно страдающего левиафана, принцип работы систем которого неспособен постичь ни один разум.

traits.locale_text: The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.

The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.

The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.

languages.text: 腐敗の鎖は、永遠にその船の壁にエンジニアを縛り付け、悪魔に悩まされる巨大な生き物に変えた。船のシステムが動く原理は、もはや誰も理解できなくなっていた。
languages.original_text: The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.

traits.locale_text: 腐敗の鎖は、永遠にその船の壁にエンジニアを縛り付け、悪魔に悩まされる巨大な生き物に変えた。船のシステムが動く原理は、もはや誰も理解できなくなっていた。

languages.text: 腐化的枷锁将舰船工程师们永远禁锢在舱壁上，使其沦为一头被恶魔肆虐、困于无尽折磨的巨兽。如今，飞船系统的运作原理，再无任何心智能够理解。
languages.original_text: The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.

traits.locale_text: 腐化的枷锁将舰船工程师们永远禁锢在舱壁上，使其沦为一头被恶魔肆虐、困于无尽折磨的巨兽。如今，飞船系统的运作原理，再无任何心智能够理解。

languages.text: Les chaînes de la corruption lièrent à jamais les ingénieurs aux cloisons du vaisseau, qui se changea en un monstre gigantesque rempli de démons et piégé dans un tourment éternel. Les principes régissant le fonctionnement du vaisseau étaient maintenant un mystère dépassant l'entendement.
languages.original_text: The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.

traits.locale_text: Les chaînes de la corruption lièrent à jamais les ingénieurs aux cloisons du vaisseau, qui se changea en un monstre gigantesque rempli de démons et piégé dans un tourment éternel. Les principes régissant le fonctionnement du vaisseau étaient maintenant un mystère dépassant l'entendement.

languages.text: Las cadenas de la corrupción ligan eternamente a los ingenieros a las mamparas de la nave, lo que la convierten en un leviatán plagado de daemons atrapados en un sufrimiento eterno. Ninguna mente puede comprender ahora los principios que permiten operar a los sistemas de la nave.
languages.original_text: The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.

traits.locale_text: Las cadenas de la corrupción ligan eternamente a los ingenieros a las mamparas de la nave, lo que la convierten en un leviatán plagado de daemons atrapados en un sufrimiento eterno. Ninguna mente puede comprender ahora los principios que permiten operar a los sistemas de la nave.

languages.text: Yozlaşmanın prangaları, mühendisleri sonsuza dek geminin bölmelerine bağlayarak onu sonsuz bir işkenceye hapsolmuş, iblis istilasına uğramış bir deve dönüştürdü. Geminin sistemlerinin çalışma prensipleri artık hiçbir zihnin kavrayamayacağı bir hâl aldı.
languages.original_text: The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.

traits.locale_text: Yozlaşmanın prangaları, mühendisleri sonsuza dek geminin bölmelerine bağlayarak onu sonsuz bir işkenceye hapsolmuş, iblis istilasına uğramış bir deve dönüştürdü. Geminin sistemlerinin çalışma prensipleri artık hiçbir zihnin kavrayamayacağı bir hâl aldı.

languages.text: Die Fesseln der Verderbnis banden die Ingenieure für immer an die Schotten des Schiffs und verwandelten es in einen von Dämonen heimgesuchten, in endloser Folter gefangenen Leviathan. Die Prinzipien, mit denen die Systeme des Schiffes operierten, erhellten nun das Verständnis aller Menschen.
languages.original_text: The shackles of corruption forever bound the engineers to the bulkheads of the ship, turning it into a daemon-plagued leviathan trapped in endless torment. The principles by which the vessel's systems operated now eluded the comprehension of any mind.
